name: cde-storage
title: Storage Footprint & Capacity
description: CDE-authored — storage TB by source, structured-vs-unstructured & object-size distribution over PDC-BIDB-EXT.

dataAccesses.name: TbBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM(size_bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb FROM entity_storage_demo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: TbByRestype
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT resource_type AS rt, ROUND(SUM(size_bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb FROM entity_storage_demo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: SizeDist
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT band, count(*) AS assets FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN size_bytes<1e9 THEN '1. <1 GB' WHEN size_bytes<1e10 THEN '2. 1-10 GB' WHEN size_bytes<1e11 THEN '3. 10-100 GB' WHEN size_bytes<1e12 THEN '4. 100GB-1TB' ELSE '5. 1 TB+' END AS band FROM entity_storage_demo) t GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
